name: dap-portal
description: Digital Asset Portal edition: base scaffold + fixture catalog + the Digital Assets Portal content surface (area 26, ~32 pages on Swift-v2 item types). DAP is a content-only add-on surface (no item types / repositories / delivery API — unlike headless), so the gate proves it via the generic content-surface path: stage the surface replace tree, deserialize with the base engine (Invoke-DeserializeBoth), and smoke the portal home. NOTE: DAP 1.0 is Beta (captured DW 10.26.7, not previously demonstrated end-to-end strict-mode); this edition is its first gate proof.
